title.es: MPT, CAPM y su Critica Probabilistica
title.en: MPT, CAPM and their Probabilistic Critique

summary_es: Este modulo examina la Modern Portfolio Theory y CAPM, sus 5 fallas fundamentales (normalidad, covarianzas inestables, sensibilidad a inputs, volatilidad como riesgo, ergodicidad), y las alternativas. Se demuestra que MPT es un 'estimation error maximizer' donde perturbaciones de 0.01% en retornos esperados cambian pesos drasticamente. Se compara MPT con naive diversification (1/N) fuera de muestra, mostrando que 1/N frecuentemente supera a MPT. Se demuestra que las correlaciones aumentan en crisis, destruyendo la diversificacion cuando mas se necesita. Se presentan ensambles probabilisticos de portafolios como alternativa: distribuciones de pesos en vez de un punto unico.
summary_en: This module examines Modern Portfolio Theory and CAPM, their 5 fundamental failures (normality, unstable covariances, input sensitivity, volatility as risk, ergodicity), and alternatives. MPT is shown to be an 'estimation error maximizer' where 0.01% perturbations in expected returns drastically change weights. MPT is compared with naive diversification (1/N) out-of-sample, showing 1/N frequently outperforms MPT. Crisis correlations increasing and destroying diversification are demonstrated. Probabilistic portfolio ensembles are presented as alternative: weight distributions instead of single points.
learning_objectives_es: Explicar las 5 fallas fundamentales de MPT en mercados financieros reales
Demostrar la sensibilidad extrema de MPT a errores de estimacion
Comparar MPT vs 1/N fuera de muestra con simulaciones
Mostrar como las correlaciones cambian en crisis destruyendo diversificacion
Presentar ensambles probabilisticos de portafolios como alternativa
learning_objectives_en: Explain MPT's 5 fundamental failures in real financial markets
Demonstrate MPT's extreme sensitivity to estimation errors
Compare MPT vs 1/N out-of-sample with simulations
Show how crisis correlations destroy diversification
Present probabilistic portfolio ensembles as alternative

parameters.name: MPT Estimation Error
parameters.origin_phrase: MPT is an estimation error maximizer - tiny input changes cause huge weight shifts

parameters.name: Naive Diversification
parameters.origin_phrase: 1/N frequently outperforms MPT out-of-sample by avoiding estimation error

parameters.name: Crisis Correlations
parameters.origin_phrase: Correlations increase in crisis, destroying diversification when most needed
